description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly metallic and polymer construction, highlighted by a striking orange and gray color scheme. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail, allowing for the attachment of various optics and accessories. The handguard is vented with a series of evenly spaced slots, likely for weight reduction and heat dissipation. The grip is angled and ergonomic, with a visible magazine well and a detachable magazine inserted. The buttstock is compact and integrated into the rear of the receiver, with a minimalistic, skeletonized appearance. The barrel is short and robust, ending in a simple muzzle with no visible device attached.
description: A modern, orange and gray tactical rifle with a vented handguard, full-length rail, and compact skeletonized stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, orange and gray panels, vented handguard, and attached magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, vented handguard, and the alignment of the Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clearer visibility of the grip and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the compact stock and the alignment of the upper rail and handguard.
